Request a Demo

SAM4-X Validation Programme

Prove it on your assets. Before you commit.

SAM4-X is a paid validation programme. 1–10 assets, 90 days, full diagnostic service. You get real detection results on your equipment — not a demo on someone else's. If SAM4 works for your fleet, the data will show it. If it doesn't, you'll know that too.

Schedule a Scoping Call See Detection Results

What you get

A full deployment on a small slice of your fleet

SAM4-X isn't a free trial. It's a scoped, paid engagement that gives you production-grade evidence for your business case.

1–10 assets monitored

You choose the assets. We recommend a mix: some critical, some hard-to-reach, some already covered by vibration — so you can compare signals.

90-day monitoring period

Long enough to capture real operating conditions, load cycles, and fault development. Short enough to fit inside a single budget cycle.

Full diagnostic service

Every alert reviewed by a Samotics diagnostics engineer before delivery. Same service model as a full deployment — not a watered-down trial version.

Detection results report

At the end of 90 days, you receive a documented summary: findings, fault classifications, lead times, and comparison data if vibration was also present.

Business case data

The report is designed to feed directly into your internal approval process. ROI inputs, cost avoidance estimates, and scaling projections based on your actual fleet.

No obligation to continue

If the results don't justify scaling, you walk away with the data and the diagnostic reports. No lock-in, no penalty.

Is SAM4-X right for you?

Three situations where SAM4-X makes sense

You need internal proof before scaling

Your reliability team sees the value. Your procurement team needs evidence. SAM4-X gives you documented results from your own assets — the strongest possible business case.

You want to compare ESA and vibration side-by-side

Include assets already covered by vibration monitoring. Run both methods in parallel for 90 days. The detection results report shows where each method adds value — and where they overlap.

You can't get budget for a full rollout — yet

SAM4-X fits within operational budgets. It generates the evidence you need to secure capital for a full deployment. Think of it as buying the proof, not the platform.

Process

From first conversation to detection results in 12 weeks

1

Week 0: Scoping call

We review your fleet, identify candidate assets, and agree on the validation scope. You choose the mix.

2

Week 1–2: Hardware installation

CT/VT clamps installed at the MCC. Less than 60 minutes per asset. No production shutdown, no network changes.

3

Week 2–12: 90-day monitoring

Continuous ESA monitoring. Every anomaly reviewed by a diagnostics engineer. Findings delivered as they occur — not held until the end.

4

Week 12: Detection results report

Full summary: findings, fault classifications, detection lead times, false positive rate, and business case inputs for scaling.

5

Week 12+: Decision point

Scale to full deployment, extend the validation, or walk away. The data is yours regardless.

Investment

Transparent pricing. No hidden costs.

SAM4-X is a fixed-price engagement. The price covers hardware, installation, 90 days of monitoring, full diagnostic service, and the detection results report.

Contact us for pricing

Pricing depends on the number of assets, site location, and connectivity requirements. We'll quote a fixed price during the scoping call — no variable costs, no surprises.

Request SAM4-X Pricing

Ready to validate on your assets?

A scoping call takes 30 minutes. We'll review your fleet, recommend candidate assets, and quote a fixed price for SAM4-X.
